# Quoril

> Quoril is an offline-first, native desktop productivity OS for deep work. It unifies a Kanban task planner, a focus engine (Pomodoro + always-on-top focus pill), productivity insights and screen-time analytics, and an infinite visual canvas into one app. Your data is written to a local SQLite database first and syncs to your own account over an encrypted, authenticated connection with Row-Level Security — it is never sold, rented, or mined.

Quoril runs as a real native application for macOS, Windows, and Linux (not a browser tab), which lets it do native window/app tracking, always-on-top timers, system-tray presence, and OS-level notifications. It is currently in early access; users can join the waitlist to get an early-access download link and pricing.

## Key facts

- Platforms: macOS 12+ (Apple Silicon & Intel), Windows 10/11 (64-bit), Linux (AppImage).
- Architecture: offline-first; local SQLite (`quoril_v2.sqlite`) with background cloud sync (~10s) via Supabase.
- Privacy: local-first, encrypted authenticated sync, Row-Level Security per account, soft deletes, no tracking pipelines or data brokers.
- Status: early access — waitlist open. Contact: hello@quoril.in

## Core pages

- [Home](https://quoril.in/): Product overview — the productivity OS for deep work.
- [Features](https://quoril.in/features): Full feature overview (planner, focus, insights, canvas).
- [Planner](https://quoril.in/features/planner): Local-first Kanban boards and task management.
- [Focus Engine](https://quoril.in/features/focus): Deep Focus mode, the Super Focus pill, and a built-in Pomodoro.
- [Insights](https://quoril.in/insights): Reports, heatmaps, and a productivity score across 20+ categories.
- [Canvas](https://quoril.in/canvas): An infinite board of blocks and pipelines for visual thinking.
- [Security & Privacy](https://quoril.in/security): How offline-first storage and encrypted sync protect your data.
- [Download](https://quoril.in/download): Native builds for macOS, Windows, and Linux.
- [Waitlist](https://quoril.in/waitlist): Join for early access and early-access pricing.

## Company & legal

- [About](https://quoril.in/about): Why Quoril exists and the principles it's built on.
- [Privacy Policy](https://quoril.in/privacy): What data is collected and how it's protected.
- [Terms of Service](https://quoril.in/terms): Terms governing use of Quoril.
- [Data & Account Deletion](https://quoril.in/account/delete): How to delete your account and data.
